creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I forgot to fix the master site. This new patch supercedes the previous
one.

diff -ruN netpanzer.old/Makefile netpanzer/Makefile
--- netpanzer.old/Makefile	Sun Apr 15 16:35:47 2007
+++ netpanzer/Makefile	Sun Apr 15 18:08:43 2007
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	netpanzer
-PORTVERSION=	0.8
-PORTREVISION=	4
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	http://download.berlios.de/netpanzer/
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_BERLIOS}
 
 MAINTAINER=	mad@madpilot.net
 COMMENT=	Real time, isometric view, tank multiplayer strategy game
diff -ruN netpanzer.old/distinfo netpanzer/distinfo
--- netpanzer.old/distinfo	Sun Apr 15 16:35:47 2007
+++ netpanzer/distinfo	Sun Apr 15 16:44:42 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (netpanzer-0.8.tar.bz2) = c08c1b703eac533407db02510deca68e
-SHA256 (netpanzer-0.8.tar.bz2) = 468e0d7a6d16aeeb9f7f68214a26db7ceb90fc4876a3da2de63b711b83d71233
-SIZE (netpanzer-0.8.tar.bz2) = 382007
+MD5 (netpanzer-0.8.1.tar.bz2) = 044afc7559d9783abbea8deaa33d7a73
+SHA256 (netpanzer-0.8.1.tar.bz2) = 9c6706142c2d39f0fb09a48c94d4c90069a8959cc5c30a98d8c10d03d0b2432d
+SIZE (netpanzer-0.8.1.tar.bz2) = 392603

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
